1:
You meet a young botanist still reeling from a frightful encounter with a fiend. The boy reveals that he was chased away while searching for plant specimens in an effort to emulate his hero. He asks you to brave the bushes in his stead, and bring back a nepheletta fronds, irenaris leaves, and some banana leaves for his colellection.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.
